mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(AC.DDATE_STR, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS ddateStr, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(GET_AR_SHIFTNO(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(AC.DDATE, 'yyyy/mm/dd'), AC.CPNY_ID), #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS overTypeIdName, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(SHIFT.SHIFT_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS shiftName, GET_AR_ALL_DATETYPE(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AC.DDATE_STR, AC.CPNY_ID) AS dateType, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(GET_AR_ALL_DATETYPE(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AC.DDATE_STR, AC.CPNY_ID), #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS dateName, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_START_TIME(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AC.DDATE_STR, AC.CPNY_ID), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI' ) AS shiftStartTime, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_END_TIME(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AC.DDATE_STR, AC.CPNY_ID), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI' ) AS shiftEndTime, GET_AR_MAC_TIME(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR},AC.DDATE_STR,'IN') INDOOR_TIME, GET_AR_MAC_TIME(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR},AC.DDATE_STR,'OUT') OUTDOOR_TIME FROM AR_CALENDER AC JOIN AR_SHIFT020 SHIFT ON GET_AR_SHIFTNO(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AC.DDATE_STR, AC.CPNY_ID) = SHIFT.SHIFT_NO WHERE AC.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AC.DDATE_STR >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND AC.DDATE_STR <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') GROUP BY AC.DDATE_STR, SHIFT.SHIFT_NO, AC.CPNY_ID, AC.OVERTYPEID, AC.DDATE ORDER BY AC.DDATE_STR
